title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: They will probably announce the results of the competition tomorrow.
I'm sure he didn't write that letter because it's not his handwriting.
questions.afterGap: that letter because it's not his handwriting.

questions.firstSentence: The match was postponed because the pitch was waterlogged.
I regret not taking your advice earlier.
It was very kind of you to help me with my luggage.
He is so intelligent that he can solve any problem.
questions.afterGap: that he can solve any problem.
